compiled_state.title: Investigate inconsistency between 'Acceptance criteria:' and '## ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA' formats in ticket creation

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Root cause: sprint-next-batch.sh regex only matches all-caps '## ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA' but check-acceptance-criteria.sh accepts any case via tolower(). Fix: make sprint-next-batch.sh regex case-insensitive.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
